MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-19-2011 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO VACATE ORDER OF COURT STRIKING THE COMPLAINT. ELIZABETH RILES APPEARING FOR PLIANTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT DENIED PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO VACATE ORDER OF COURT STRIKING THE COMPLAINT. UNDER HU VS. SILGAN CONTAINERS CORP. (1999) 70 CAL.APP.4TH 1261, 1269, THE COURT DOES NOT HAVE AUTHORITY, FOR LACK OF JURISDICTION, TO REINSTATE THE COMPLAINT AFTER IT HAS BEEN STRICKEN FOR FAILURE TO PAY FILING FEES.
